personal_profile.headline: Staff Backend Platform Engineer
personal_profile.summary: Backend platform engineer focused on architecture, cloud infrastructure, reliability, and delivery execution.

bullets.text: Architected AWS and Kubernetes platform services with Terraform, reducing deployment time 68% across backend systems.
Led Python and PostgreSQL API reliability work that reduced Sev-1 incidents 42% and improved p95 latency 33%.
Owned internal platform automation for CI/CD and self-serve service provisioning used by 14 engineering teams.
Built Go payment services with Redis caching, increasing checkout throughput 27% while maintaining audit-compliant controls.

projects.name: Internal Platform Portal
projects.summary: Built an internal developer portal on Python and React to automate cloud environment requests and service onboarding.

bullets.text: Built Python APIs and React workflows that cut environment setup time by 80% for backend teams.

awards.title: Platform Excellence Award
awards.summary: Recognized for leading platform modernization and improving reliability across core backend services.
